title: lannea stuhlmannii
intro: Lannea stuhlmannii, a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, is also known as the Stuhlmann's halleria or Stuhlmann's halleria nut. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate various health conditions such as fever, wounds, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Lannea stuhlmannii can be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
